title: [FIRRTL] Add optional yaml parameter to view intrinsic, op
body:
Per View indication of whether and where to emit YAML description.

Provides access to mechanism currently encoded via `sifive.enterprise.grandcentral.GrandCentralHierarchyFileAnnotation`.

(new) Views with this parameter will have YAML output to the specified path.
Otherwise, fallback to behavior for annotation-based views (using the value from that annotation, if specified).

This is needed to separate out which Views have YAML emitted, so that some may have no YAML or emit it elsewhere (and to allow dropping the above annotation eventually).
